question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'स्थलांतरित' (Moved out) आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी जिल्हा कोड आणि नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांकांची (new household split numbers) गणना करा, त्यांचे जिल्हा कोडनुसार गट करा आणि सर्वाधिक गणना असलेले केवळ पहिले ५ जिल्हे दर्शवा.

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.DISTRICT_CODE, 
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE h
JOIN 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS hs ON h.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = hs.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY g ON h.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    hs.COMPLETION_STATUS ILIKE 'moved out'
GROUP BY 
    g.DISTRICT_CODE
ORDER BY 
    count DESC
LIMIT 5;

    g.DISTRICT_CODE

    JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES ddc ON fpc.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = ddc.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID
    GROUP BY fpc.HOUSEHOLD_ID
) sub
WHERE qualified = total_people;

    FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE fpc

predicted_sql: SELECT MIGRANT_ID, EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL WHERE MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE ILIKE 'Married';
raw_output: SELECT MIGRANT_ID, EDUCATION_AT_MIGRATION_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE FROM FACT_MIGRANT_PERSONAL WHERE MARITAL_STATUS_AT_MIGRATION_CODE ILIKE 'Married';

question: मृत्यूच्या वेळी विवाहित असलेल्या आणि मृत्यूच्या वेळी नोकरीवर नसलेल्या मृत व्यक्तींच्या व्यवसायांच्या आयडीची (IDs) चढत्या क्रमाने यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OCCUPATION_ID FROM FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS AS T2 ON T1.DECEASED_ID = T2.DECEASED_ID WHERE T2.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_DEATH_CODE = 'Married' AND T1.EMPLOYED_AT_DEATH = 'No' ORDER BY T1.OCCUPATION_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.occupation_id
FROM fact_deceased_occupation d
JOIN fact_deceased_person_details p ON d.deceased_id = p.deceased_id
WHERE p.marital_status_at_death_code = 'Married'
  AND d.employed_at_death = 'No'
ORDER BY d.occupation_id ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT d.occupation_id
FROM fact_deceased_occupation d
JOIN fact_deceased_person_details p ON d.deceased_id = p.deceased_id

FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_TRACKING fht
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE fc ON fht.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fc.HOUSEHOLD_ID

raw_output:

WHERE fht.SAME_ADDRESS_INDICATOR = 'Yes';

question: व्यवसाय आयडी (occupation ID) १, २, किंवा ३ असलेल्या व्यवसायांचे वर्णन आणि त्यांच्या नोंदींची एकूण संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, ही यादी संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा आणि केवळ पहिले ५ निकाल दर्शवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_OCCUPATION_CODES AS T1 JOIN FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION AS T2 ON T1.OCCUPATION_ID = T2.OCCUPATION_ID WHERE T2.OCCUPATION_ID IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY T1.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    oc.occupation_description, 
    COUNT(*) AS total_entries
FROM 
    dim_occupation_codes oc
JOIN 
    fact_migrant_employment m ON oc.occupation_id = m.occupation_id
WHERE 
    oc.occupation_id IN (1, 2, 3)
GROUP BY 
    oc.occupation_id, oc.occupation_description
ORDER BY 
    total_entries DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    oc.occupation_description, 
    COUNT(*) AS total_entries
FROM 
    dim_occupation_codes oc
JOIN 
    fact_migrant_employment m ON oc.occupation_id = m.occupation_id
WHERE 
    oc.occupation_id IN (1, 2, 3)
GROUP BY 
    oc.occupation_id, oc.occupation_description
ORDER BY 
    total_entries DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांसाठी जिल्हा कोड '५', '९' किंवा '२०' आहे आणि कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (household split number) ० किंवा त्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, अशा कुटुंबांचे राज्य कोड, जिल्हा कोड आणि कुटुंब आयडी (household ID) यांची यादी करा; हे याच राज्य कोड, जिल्हा कोड आणि कुटुंब आयडीनुसार गटबद्ध (grouped) करा आणि त्यांच्या ट्रॅकिंग रेकॉर्डच्या एकूण संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.

    g.STATE_CODE,
